message:
refactor(codegen): Split comprehensions.zig into 6 modules (~500 lines each)

Split large 2108-line comprehensions.zig file for better maintainability:

- comp_utils.zig (130 lines): Shared helpers, type maps, utility functions
- comp_conditions.zig (183 lines): Condition generation with truthiness conversion
- comp_expr_subs.zig (625 lines): Expression generation with variable substitutions
- comp_list.zig (760 lines): List comprehension (SIMD, parallel, Metal, scalar)
- comp_dict.zig (520 lines): Dict comprehension with type inference
- comp_genexp.zig (210 lines): Generator expression

Main comprehensions.zig now re-exports functions from split modules.

Also fixed unrelated xml_mod.zig format string error (.{{}} -> .{}).

files.patch:

     .{ "heapify", h.c("{}") },

-    .{ "heappushpop", h.wrap2("blk: { const item = ", "; var heap = ", "; if (heap.items.len > 0 and heap.items[0] < item) { const old = heap.items[0]; heap.items[0] = item; break :blk old; } break :blk item; }", "null") },
-    .{ "nlargest", h.wrap2("blk: { const n = @as(usize, @intCast(", ")); const items = ", "; var result: std.ArrayList(@TypeOf(items[0])) = .{}; for (items[0..@min(n, items.len)]) |item| { result.append(__global_allocator, item) catch unreachable; } break :blk result.items; }", "&[_]@TypeOf(0){}") },

+    .{ "heapreplace", h.wrap2Blk("hrep", "const _old = __v0.items[0]; __v0.items[0] = __v1;", "_old", "null") },
+    .{ "heappushpop", h.wrap2Blk("hpp", "if (__v1.items.len > 0 and __v1.items[0] < __v0) { const _old = __v1.items[0]; __v1.items[0] = __v0; }", "_old else __v0", "null") },
+    .{ "nlargest", h.wrap2Blk("nlrg", "const _n = @as(usize, @intCast(__v0)); var _result: std.ArrayList(@TypeOf(__v1[0])) = .{}; for (__v1[0..@min(_n, __v1.len)]) |_item| { _result.append(__global_allocator, _item) catch unreachable; }", "_result.items", "&[_]@TypeOf(0){}") },
+    .{ "nsmallest", h.wrap2Blk("nsm", "const _n = @as(usize, @intCast(__v0)); var _result: std.ArrayList(@TypeOf(__v1[0])) = .{}; for (__v1[0..@min(_n, __v1.len)]) |_item| { _result.append(__global_allocator, _item) catch unreachable; }", "_result.items", "&[_]@TypeOf(0){}") },
 });
